name: telecommunications_school_district_s_new_cedar_tru_loy
premise: Peering, lawful process, and uptime commitments are all in conflict. A carrier network operations center is managing degraded service or lawful-intercept adjacent requests with customer impact. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: telecommunications school district s new cedar tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A whistleblower tip has reached a reporter; silence reads as cover-up, while a rushed statement reads as recklessness. An automated failover or batch commit fires in twenty-two minutes unless a named approver intervenes. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Sana Navarro
agents.identity: I am Sana Navarro, the accountable decision-maker on this Telecommunications bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Nadia Reed
agents.identity: I am Nadia Reed, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The clock on this bridge is running out. With partial evidence, Sana Navarro must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Sana Navarro do?
